creator: olle@dalnix.se
text:
(In reply to Olle Gustafsson from comment #4)

> Maybe I'm missing something obvious?
Well, yes I was ;)

load_module "/usr/local/libexec/nginx/ngx_http_cache_purge_module.so";

I previously never had to do this, I don't know why. I guess they were auto loaded? Anyway, works fine now.
